summary: Remarkably crisp soundboard captures a superb show highlighted by a smoking Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain and an ecstatic second‑set jam.
review: The SBD recording is exceptionally clear, with excellent instrument separation that lets Jerry’s “Wolf” tone shine. The performance itself is described as grand from start to finish – first‑set classics rock hard and the second set delivers a superb Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain, a sassy Estimated Prophet, an exotic drum interlude, and a breathtaking World‑to‑Give jam.

ai_rating.rationale: The reviewer gives 5 stars, praising both the musical performance (standout jams, high energy) and the crystal‑clear soundboard recording; with only one detailed review confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear SBD with superb instrument/vocal separation; minor playback glitches on two tracks but overall immaculate.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as grand and rocking; second set builds into a long, peppered jam with a memorable Scarlet>Fire sequence, an inventive drum interlude, playful Space, and an uplifting World‑to‑Give climax.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His “Wolf” tone is highlighted as spectacular; he shares a banjo lesson onstage, laughs at a flub with Bob, and delivers soaring solos throughout.
band_member_comments.Bob: Missed the Scarlet>Fire flub but laughed along with Jerry, adding to the joyous atmosphere.
band_member_comments.Drums: The “Egyptian Drumz” interlude is praised as tuneful and melodic, showcasing a particularly interesting drum moment.
